planetInSign.sun_aries: Bold, pioneering identity driven by courage and initiative. Natural leader who thrives on challenge and new beginnings.
planetInSign.sun_taurus: Steady, sensual identity rooted in material security and comfort. Patient builder who values loyalty and lasting pleasures.
planetInSign.sun_gemini: Curious, adaptable identity fueled by communication and mental stimulation. Quick-witted connector who gathers and shares information.
planetInSign.sun_cancer: Nurturing, protective identity centered on emotional security and family bonds. Intuitive caretaker with deep memory and sensitivity.
planetInSign.sun_leo: Radiant, generous identity expressed through creativity and self-expression. Warm-hearted performer who inspires loyalty and admiration.
planetInSign.sun_virgo: Analytical, service-oriented identity dedicated to refinement and practical improvement. Discerning helper who seeks meaningful contribution.
planetInSign.sun_libra: Harmonious, diplomatic identity focused on partnership and aesthetic balance. Natural mediator who seeks fairness and beauty in all things.
planetInSign.sun_scorpio: Intense, transformative identity driven by deep emotional truth and power. Investigative soul who seeks authentic connection and regeneration.
planetInSign.sun_sagittarius: Expansive, philosophical identity fueled by adventure and higher meaning. Optimistic explorer who seeks wisdom through experience and travel.
planetInSign.sun_capricorn: Ambitious, disciplined identity built on responsibility and long-term achievement. Strategic climber who earns authority through perseverance.
planetInSign.sun_aquarius: Innovative, humanitarian identity dedicated to progress and collective ideals. Independent thinker who challenges convention for social evolution.
planetInSign.sun_pisces: Compassionate, mystical identity attuned to universal empathy and imagination. Sensitive dreamer who dissolves boundaries between self and other.
planetInSign.moon_aries: Emotional nature is fiery and impulsive. Needs independence and action to feel secure. Quick to react, quick to recover.
planetInSign.moon_taurus: Emotional nature is calm, grounded, and comfort-seeking. Needs stability and sensory pleasure. Deeply loyal once trust is established.
planetInSign.moon_gemini: Emotional nature is restless and intellectually curious. Processes feelings through conversation and mental activity. Needs variety and stimulation.
planetInSign.moon_cancer: Emotional nature is deeply sensitive and nurturing. Powerful intuition and strong attachment to home. Needs safety and emotional reciprocity.
planetInSign.moon_leo: Emotional nature is warm, dramatic, and generous. Needs recognition and creative expression to feel fulfilled. Pride runs deep.
planetInSign.moon_virgo: Emotional nature is practical and detail-oriented. Processes feelings through analysis and service. Needs order and usefulness to feel secure.
planetInSign.moon_libra: Emotional nature craves harmony and partnership. Needs beauty and balanced relationships. Uncomfortable with conflict, seeks diplomatic resolution always.
planetInSign.moon_scorpio: Emotional nature is intense, private, and penetrating. Needs depth and absolute trust. Powerful emotional resilience through transformation.
planetInSign.moon_sagittarius: Emotional nature is optimistic and freedom-loving. Needs adventure, philosophy, and expansive experiences. Restless when confined or routine-bound.
planetInSign.moon_capricorn: Emotional nature is reserved, cautious, and achievement-oriented. Needs structure and respect. Processes feelings slowly but with great endurance.
planetInSign.moon_aquarius: Emotional nature is detached, progressive, and humanitarian. Needs intellectual freedom and space. Processes feelings through ideals and group connection.
planetInSign.moon_pisces: Emotional nature is boundlessly empathic and imaginative. Needs creative or spiritual outlets. Absorbs surrounding emotions like a psychic sponge.
planetInSign.mercury_aries: Quick, assertive communication style. Thinks fast, speaks directly. Loves debate and pioneering ideas. Impatient with slow deliberation.
planetInSign.mercury_taurus: Deliberate, practical thinking style. Methodical mind that values concrete results. Excellent memory. Resistant to changing established opinions.
planetInSign.mercury_gemini: Brilliant, versatile communicator at home in its ruling sign. Rapid information processing, witty speech, and insatiable intellectual curiosity.
planetInSign.mercury_cancer: Intuitive, emotional thinking style. Excellent memory tied to feelings. Communicates with empathy and protective concern for others.
planetInSign.mercury_leo: Dramatic, confident communication style. Thinks in grand narratives. Creative speaker who commands attention. Pride in intellectual expression.
planetInSign.mercury_virgo: Precise, analytical mind at peak strength in its ruling sign. Exceptional at categorizing details, problem-solving, and critical evaluation.
planetInSign.mercury_libra: Balanced, diplomatic thinking style. Weighs all perspectives before deciding. Elegant communicator who excels at negotiation and mediation.
planetInSign.mercury_scorpio: Penetrating, investigative mind that seeks hidden truths. Powerful research ability. Strategic communicator who reads between every line.
planetInSign.mercury_sagittarius: Expansive, philosophical thinking focused on big-picture meaning. Enthusiastic communicator who can overlook details in pursuit of truth.
planetInSign.mercury_capricorn: Structured, strategic thinking oriented toward practical goals. Authoritative communicator who values tradition, planning, and proven methods.
planetInSign.mercury_aquarius: Original, progressive thinking that challenges convention. Innovative problem-solver drawn to technology, systems, and humanitarian concepts.
planetInSign.mercury_pisces: Imaginative, intuitive thinking that absorbs impressions holistically. Poetic communicator whose mind works through symbols, dreams, and empathy.
planetInSign.venus_aries: Passionate, impulsive approach to love and beauty. Pursues desire boldly. Values excitement and conquest in relationships and aesthetics.
planetInSign.venus_taurus: Deeply sensual, loyal approach to love in its ruling sign. Values physical comfort, beauty, and enduring devotion in relationships.
planetInSign.venus_gemini: Flirtatious, intellectually stimulated approach to love. Values witty conversation and mental connection. Needs variety and social engagement.
planetInSign.venus_cancer: Tender, nurturing approach to love focused on emotional security. Values family bonds and domestic comfort. Deeply sentimental and protective.
planetInSign.venus_leo: Dramatic, generous approach to love that craves adoration and romance. Values grand gestures, loyalty, and creative shared experiences.
planetInSign.venus_virgo: Devoted, practical approach to love expressed through acts of service. Values quality, refinement, and quiet dedication over drama.
planetInSign.venus_libra: Graceful, partnership-oriented approach to love in its ruling sign. Values harmony, beauty, and equality. Natural romantic and aesthete.
planetInSign.venus_scorpio: Intense, all-or-nothing approach to love seeking soul-deep connection. Values loyalty, passion, and emotional honesty. Jealousy runs deep.
planetInSign.venus_sagittarius: Adventurous, freedom-loving approach to love. Values shared philosophies and exploration. Needs space and growth within relationships.
planetInSign.venus_capricorn: Reserved, committed approach to love that builds over time. Values status, tradition, and reliable partnership. Loyalty earned through consistency.
planetInSign.venus_aquarius: Unconventional, friendship-based approach to love. Values intellectual connection and individual freedom. Attracted to unique and progressive partners.
planetInSign.venus_pisces: Dreamy, selfless approach to love in its exalted sign. Boundless compassion and romantic idealism. Values spiritual and artistic connection.
planetInSign.mars_aries: Peak warrior energy in its ruling sign. Fearless, direct action style. Powerful initiative and competitive drive. Quick temper, quick recovery.
planetInSign.mars_taurus: Slow-building, unstoppable determination. Patient but immensely powerful when roused. Fights for material security and sensory satisfaction.
planetInSign.mars_gemini: Quick, versatile action style driven by mental energy. Fights with words and wit. Scattered energy across multiple pursuits.
planetInSign.mars_cancer: Defensive, emotionally-driven action style. Fights fiercely to protect family and home. Passive-aggressive when threatened, tenacious when motivated.
planetInSign.mars_leo: Dramatic, confident action style fueled by pride and creativity. Natural performer who leads with charisma. Fights for recognition.
planetInSign.mars_virgo: Precise, methodical action style focused on efficiency and improvement. Strategic worker who excels at detailed execution and problem-solving.
planetInSign.mars_libra: Action filtered through fairness and partnership concerns. Fights for justice and balance. Can be indecisive but powerful when principles demand.
planetInSign.mars_scorpio: Intensely strategic action in its traditional ruling sign. Relentless willpower, magnetic force. Fights with psychological depth and endurance.
planetInSign.mars_sagittarius: Bold, enthusiastic action driven by ideals and adventure. Fights for beliefs and freedom. Broad, optimistic energy that inspires others.
planetInSign.mars_capricorn: Disciplined, calculated action in its exalted sign. Supreme ambition channeled through patience and strategy. Climbs relentlessly toward goals.
planetInSign.mars_aquarius: Rebellious, unconventional action driven by progressive ideals. Fights for collective causes and individual freedom. Unpredictable but principled.
planetInSign.mars_pisces: Subtle, intuitive action style guided by compassion and imagination. Fights through creative or spiritual means. Energy fluctuates with emotions.
planetInSign.jupiter_aries: Expansion through bold initiative and courageous leadership. Luck arrives through taking risks and pioneering new paths independently.
planetInSign.jupiter_taurus: Expansion through material abundance and sensory enjoyment. Luck arrives through patience, investment, and appreciation of natural wealth.
planetInSign.jupiter_gemini: Expansion through communication, learning, and social connections. Luck arrives through versatility, networking, and intellectual exploration.
planetInSign.jupiter_cancer: Expansion through nurturing, emotional generosity, and family in its exalted sign. Luck arrives through compassion and domestic abundance.
planetInSign.jupiter_leo: Expansion through creative self-expression and generous leadership. Luck arrives through confidence, performance, and inspiring others boldly.
planetInSign.jupiter_virgo: Expansion through service, health improvement, and detailed craftsmanship. Luck arrives through practical skills and helping others efficiently.
planetInSign.jupiter_libra: Expansion through partnerships, diplomacy, and artistic pursuits. Luck arrives through collaboration, fairness, and cultivating harmonious relationships.
planetInSign.jupiter_scorpio: Expansion through deep transformation and shared resources. Luck arrives through investigation, inheritance, and facing hidden truths fearlessly.
planetInSign.jupiter_sagittarius: Maximum expansion in its ruling sign through philosophy, travel, and higher education. Boundless optimism and natural teaching ability.
planetInSign.jupiter_capricorn: Expansion through disciplined achievement and institutional authority. Growth is slow but substantial. Luck arrives through patience and reputation.
planetInSign.jupiter_aquarius: Expansion through innovation, humanitarian causes, and group endeavors. Luck arrives through technology, community, and progressive thinking.
planetInSign.jupiter_pisces: Expansion through spiritual growth, compassion, and artistic vision in its traditional ruling sign. Boundless empathy and creative abundance.
planetInSign.saturn_aries: Lessons in patience and controlled initiative. Must learn disciplined courage. Frustration around independence becomes mastery of assertive leadership.
planetInSign.saturn_taurus: Lessons in resourcefulness and material responsibility. Must earn security through persistent effort. Mastery of practical self-sufficiency over time.
planetInSign.saturn_gemini: Lessons in focused communication and mental discipline. Must develop structured thinking. Mastery of clear, authoritative speech and writing.
planetInSign.saturn_cancer: Lessons in emotional boundaries and family responsibility. Must balance nurturing with self-protection. Mastery of mature emotional security.
planetInSign.saturn_leo: Lessons in humble self-expression and earned recognition. Must develop authentic confidence without ego. Mastery of disciplined creative leadership.
planetInSign.saturn_virgo: Lessons in accepting imperfection while maintaining high standards. Must balance critique with compassion. Mastery of practical, efficient service.
planetInSign.saturn_libra: Lessons in committed partnership in its exalted sign. Must develop mature fairness and enduring bonds. Mastery of balanced justice.
planetInSign.saturn_scorpio: Lessons in emotional control and power dynamics. Must face deepest fears with discipline. Mastery of psychological resilience and transformation.
planetInSign.saturn_sagittarius: Lessons in grounded wisdom and responsible belief systems. Must temper optimism with realism. Mastery of structured philosophy and teaching.
planetInSign.saturn_capricorn: Maximum authority and discipline in its ruling sign. Must bear heavy responsibility. Mastery of long-term ambition and institutional power.
planetInSign.saturn_aquarius: Lessons in structured innovation in its traditional ruling sign. Must balance individuality with social responsibility. Mastery of progressive systems.
planetInSign.saturn_pisces: Lessons in spiritual discipline and compassionate boundaries. Must ground imagination in reality. Mastery of mature empathy and creative structure.
planetInSign.uranus_aries: Revolutionary energy in personal identity and independence. Generation that disrupts leadership norms and pioneers radical individual expression.
planetInSign.uranus_taurus: Revolutionary energy in finance, resources, and values. Generation that transforms economic systems and relationship to material security.
planetInSign.uranus_gemini: Revolutionary energy in communication and information sharing. Generation that transforms media, education, and intellectual exchange radically.
planetInSign.uranus_cancer: Revolutionary energy in home, family, and emotional expression. Generation that transforms domestic life and cultural roots fundamentally.
planetInSign.uranus_leo: Revolutionary energy in creative expression and individuality. Generation that transforms entertainment, art, and concepts of personal identity.
planetInSign.uranus_virgo: Revolutionary energy in health, work, and daily systems. Generation that transforms technology, medicine, and service methodologies radically.
planetInSign.uranus_libra: Revolutionary energy in relationships and social justice. Generation that transforms marriage, partnerships, and concepts of equality fundamentally.
planetInSign.uranus_scorpio: Revolutionary energy in power structures and transformation. Generation that transforms sexuality, psychology, and shared resources radically.
planetInSign.uranus_sagittarius: Revolutionary energy in belief systems and global connection. Generation that transforms religion, philosophy, and international understanding.
planetInSign.uranus_capricorn: Revolutionary energy in government and institutional structures. Generation that transforms authority, corporations, and social hierarchies fundamentally.
planetInSign.uranus_aquarius: Peak revolutionary energy in its ruling sign. Generation that transforms technology, humanitarian ideals, and collective consciousness profoundly.
planetInSign.uranus_pisces: Revolutionary energy in spirituality and collective imagination. Generation that transforms mysticism, art, and compassionate consciousness radically.
planetInSign.neptune_aries: Collective dreams of heroic individualism and spiritual warriors. Generation that idealizes courage and dissolves boundaries around personal identity.
planetInSign.neptune_taurus: Collective dreams of earthly paradise and spiritual materialism. Generation that idealizes nature and dissolves boundaries around ownership.
planetInSign.neptune_gemini: Collective dreams of universal communication and inspired ideas. Generation that idealizes knowledge and dissolves boundaries around information.
planetInSign.neptune_cancer: Collective dreams of perfect nurturing and emotional unity. Generation that idealizes family and dissolves boundaries around homeland and roots.
planetInSign.neptune_leo: Collective dreams of creative transcendence and divine play. Generation that idealizes self-expression and dissolves boundaries around identity.
planetInSign.neptune_virgo: Collective dreams of perfect health and sacred service. Generation that idealizes purity and dissolves boundaries around work and healing.
planetInSign.neptune_libra: Collective dreams of ideal love and universal harmony. Generation that idealizes partnership and dissolves boundaries around social justice.
planetInSign.neptune_scorpio: Collective dreams of deep transformation and mystical power. Generation that idealizes intensity and dissolves boundaries around sexuality and death.
planetInSign.neptune_sagittarius: Collective dreams of spiritual adventure and universal truth. Generation that idealizes freedom and dissolves boundaries around belief systems.
planetInSign.neptune_capricorn: Collective dreams of enlightened authority and spiritual ambition. Generation that idealizes achievement and dissolves boundaries around institutions.
planetInSign.neptune_aquarius: Collective dreams of technological utopia and universal brotherhood. Generation that idealizes innovation and dissolves boundaries around group identity.
planetInSign.neptune_pisces: Peak spiritual dissolution in its ruling sign. Generation experiencing profound collective empathy, mystical awakening, and creative transcendence.
planetInSign.pluto_aries: Generational transformation of personal identity, warfare, and leadership. Deep collective evolution in how humanity asserts power and pioneers change.
planetInSign.pluto_taurus: Generational transformation of economics, resources, and values. Deep collective evolution in wealth distribution and humanity's relationship to Earth.
planetInSign.pluto_gemini: Generational transformation of communication, media, and education. Deep collective evolution in information power and intellectual frameworks.
planetInSign.pluto_cancer: Generational transformation of family structures, nationalism, and emotional security. Deep collective evolution in concepts of home and belonging.
planetInSign.pluto_leo: Generational transformation of creative power, leadership, and self-expression. Deep collective evolution in entertainment, celebrity, and personal authority.
planetInSign.pluto_virgo: Generational transformation of health systems, work, and daily life. Deep collective evolution in technology, ecology, and service paradigms.
planetInSign.pluto_libra: Generational transformation of relationships, justice, and social contracts. Deep collective evolution in marriage, equality, and diplomatic power.
planetInSign.pluto_scorpio: Peak transformative intensity in its ruling sign. Generation experiencing profound psychological evolution, power dynamics, and collective rebirth.
planetInSign.pluto_sagittarius: Generational transformation of belief systems, religion, and global culture. Deep collective evolution in truth, education, and philosophical power.
planetInSign.pluto_capricorn: Generational transformation of governments, corporations, and authority structures. Deep collective evolution in institutional power and social systems.
planetInSign.pluto_aquarius: Generational transformation of technology, social networks, and collective ideals. Deep evolution in democracy, innovation, and humanitarian structures.
planetInSign.pluto_pisces: Generational transformation of spirituality, compassion, and collective consciousness. Deep evolution in mysticism, art, and universal empathy.

aspects.conjunction: Fusion of planetary energies into a single intensified force. The planets blend completely, amplifying each other's expression for better or worse. The most powerful aspect, creating focused but sometimes overwhelming concentration of themes.
aspects.sextile: Harmonious opportunity aspect requiring conscious activation. Planets cooperate naturally through compatible elements, offering talent and ease. Growth comes through gentle effort — gifts are available but must be deliberately engaged and developed.
aspects.square: Dynamic tension aspect that demands action and generates growth through friction. Planets clash at cross-purposes, creating internal conflict that ultimately builds character, resilience, and achievement through overcoming obstacles.
aspects.trine: Flowing harmony aspect where planetary energies support each other effortlessly through shared elemental affinity. Natural talent and ease that can become passive if not consciously directed toward growth and creative expression.
aspects.opposition: Polarizing awareness aspect that creates tension between competing needs requiring integration and balance. Planets face each other across the chart, demanding conscious relationship between opposing forces through projection and partnership dynamics.

houses.1: Self-identity, physical appearance, and personal initiative. How you present yourself to the world and begin new ventures. The mask you wear.
houses.2: Personal resources, money, possessions, and self-worth. What you value and how you earn, spend, and build material security.
houses.3: Communication, siblings, short journeys, and early education. How you think, speak, write, and process everyday information.
houses.4: Home, family roots, private life, and emotional foundation. Your innermost self, ancestry, and sense of belonging and security.
houses.5: Creativity, romance, children, pleasure, and self-expression. Where you play, take risks, and express your unique joy and heart.
houses.6: Daily routines, health, work habits, and service to others. How you maintain your body, refine your skills, and contribute practically.
houses.7: Partnerships, marriage, open enemies, and one-on-one relationships. How you relate to others as equals and what you seek in committed bonds.
houses.8: Transformation, shared resources, sexuality, death, and rebirth. Deep psychological processes, inheritance, taxes, and intimate power dynamics.
houses.9: Higher education, philosophy, long-distance travel, and belief systems. Your search for meaning, wisdom, and expanded understanding of life.
houses.10: Career, public reputation, authority, and life direction. Your highest ambitions, social standing, and legacy you build in the world.
houses.11: Friendships, groups, hopes, wishes, and humanitarian ideals. Your social network, community involvement, and vision for the collective future.
houses.12: Subconscious, hidden enemies, isolation, and spiritual transcendence. The unseen realm of dreams, karma, self-undoing, and divine compassion.

transits.saturn_return: Occurs approximately every 29.5 years. Major life restructuring that demands maturity and accountability. Marks the end of one life chapter and the beginning of another through hard-earned wisdom and responsibility.
transits.jupiter_return: Occurs approximately every 12 years. Period of renewed optimism, expansion, and opportunity. A fresh cycle of growth begins, bringing luck and possibility in the house Jupiter occupies natally.
transits.pluto_transit_sun: Profound identity transformation lasting 2-3 years. Ego death and rebirth process that strips away false personas. Intense empowerment through surrendering control and embracing deep personal evolution.
transits.pluto_transit_moon: Deep emotional transformation lasting 2-3 years. Buried feelings surface for healing. Family dynamics shift dramatically. Psychological rebirth through confronting emotional patterns and power dynamics.
transits.neptune_transit_sun: Dissolution of identity boundaries lasting 2-3 years. Spiritual awakening mixed with confusion. Creative and compassionate heights possible, but requires discernment to avoid deception and escapism.
transits.neptune_transit_moon: Heightened sensitivity and emotional permeability lasting 2-3 years. Psychic opening, spiritual compassion, but also vulnerability to confusion. Dreams and intuition intensify profoundly.
transits.uranus_opposition: Occurs around age 42, the classic midlife awakening. Sudden urge for freedom and authenticity disrupts established patterns. Revolutionary changes in lifestyle, relationships, or career demand liberation from stagnation.
transits.uranus_transit_sun: Electric awakening of identity lasting about one year. Sudden breaks from routine, unexpected opportunities, and radical self-reinvention. Liberation from outdated self-concepts through shock and excitement.
transits.saturn_transit_moon: Emotional austerity and maturation lasting about one year. Confronting emotional patterns with discipline. Family responsibilities increase. Building lasting emotional security through patience and realistic expectations.
transits.saturn_transit_sun: Identity testing and character strengthening lasting about one year. Authority challenges, increased responsibility, and pressure to prove yourself. Achievement through discipline and honest self-assessment.
transits.jupiter_transit_sun: Year of confidence, opportunity, and personal expansion. Doors open, optimism rises, and generosity flows. Best time for new ventures, travel, education, and broadening personal horizons.
transits.jupiter_transit_moon: Period of emotional abundance and domestic happiness. Family growth, increased comfort, and nurturing expansion. Generosity of spirit and optimism enhance personal relationships and inner security.
transits.pluto_transit_ascendant: Complete transformation of self-presentation and life direction lasting 2-3 years. Death and rebirth of persona. Others perceive you differently as deep power emerges through radical personal evolution.
transits.saturn_transit_midheaven: Career culmination or restructuring demanding professional accountability. Public reputation tested. Authority earned through demonstrated competence, or career direction fundamentally realigned with authentic purpose.
transits.neptune_transit_venus: Romantic idealization and creative inspiration lasting 2-3 years. Spiritual love experiences but risk of disillusionment. Artistic sensitivity peaks. Boundaries in relationships dissolve, requiring conscious discernment.
transits.uranus_transit_venus: Sudden changes in relationships and values lasting about one year. Unexpected attractions, breakups, or financial surprises. Liberation from stale relationship patterns through exciting but destabilizing shifts.
transits.saturn_square_saturn: Occurs approximately every 7 years. Quarter-life and three-quarter-life crises that test structural integrity. Pressure to adjust life direction, reassess goals, and strengthen foundations through disciplined effort.
transits.progressed_moon_return: Emotional cycle completion every 27.3 years. Review of emotional development and instinctive patterns. New emotional chapter begins, shifting focus to different life areas and inner needs.
transits.chiron_return: Occurs around age 50-51. Confrontation with deepest wounds becomes gateway to healing wisdom. Opportunity to transform personal pain into teaching ability and compassionate service to others.
